'''Mithail''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] individual who was the son of [[Yander (Ord Cestus)|Yander]], a native [[Miner/Legends|miner]] of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]], who once was the partner of [[Sheeka Tull]]. He had a brother, [[Tarl (Ord Cestus)|Tarl]], and a sister, [[Tonoté]]. He was the youngest of his siblings.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
